use_codes.desc: USE IN COMBINATION WITH 5-FLUOROURACIL AND LEUCOVORIN FOR THE TREATMENT OF METASTATIC COLORECTAL CANCER WHERE THE DOSE OF LEUCOVORIN IS AT LEAST 200MG PER SQUARE METER
USE OF IRINOTECAN IN COMBINATION WITH 5-FLUOROURACIL AND LEUCOVORIN FOR THE TREATMENT OF METASTATIC COLORECTAL CANCER

indications.text:
• CAMPTOSAR Injection is indicated as a component of first-line therapy in combination
with 5-fluorouracil (5-FU) and leucovorin (LV) for patients with metastatic carcinoma of the
colon or rectum.
